commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=431494ce32fdf5210e2226113dbe28d51ce52135)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a short-lived in-process cache around `reconcileInspectableTasks()` and clears it in the task registry test reset helper.

PR surface: Source +9. Total +9 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: current main still calls the registry summary and task audit helper paths separately, and each reaches `reconcileInspectableTasks()` before `listTaskRecords()` clones and sorts the task list. I did not run a live 10K-task benchmark in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR needs contributor or maintainer revision plus real behavior proof; automation should not take this over because missing contributor-side real setup proof remains a merge gate.

target.title: perf(tasks): memoize reconcileInspectableTasks for same-tick duplicate calls (fixes #73531)
target.author: liuhao1024

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
